summary: A recorded Fox News interview, posted by DHS, in a split-screen format. A male anchor in a studio at left speaks with a woman joining remotely by video at right, identified by a chyron as Jennifer Bos, described as an 'Angel Mom'. Lower-third chyrons read 'ANGEL MOM REACTS AS DEMS DEFEND SANCTUARY POLICIES' and 'ANGEL MOM: IL GOV NEEDS TO POINT FINGER AT HIMSELF', with a 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner and a 'WHITE HOUSE BRIEFING TODAY 1PM ET' box. The conversation concerns Illinois sanctuary policy and the Sheridan Gorman case. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Split screen: a male Fox News anchor in a blue suit at left, a woman in a teal top joining by webcam at right. Chyron: 'ANGEL MOM REACTS AS DEMS DEFEND SANCTUARY POLICIES'; FOX NEWS ALERT banner.
Full-frame shot of the woman speaking by webcam in front of light curtains; chyron identifies her as 'JENNIFER BOS | ANGEL MOM' above 'ANGEL MOM: IL GOV NEEDS TO POINT FINGER AT HIMSELF'.

notable_text: ANGEL MOM REACTS AS DEMS DEFEND SANCTUARY POLICIES; JENNIFER BOS ANGEL MOM; IL GOV NEEDS TO POINT FINGER AT HIMSELF; FOX NEWS ALERT
